audit_findings.claim: Introduce geometry cache for derived stereo geometry

evidence.code_observation: Epipolar geometry computation is deterministic and expensive; recomputing on every frame wastes cycles

audit_findings.reason: Cache avoids redundant computation while preserving semantic separation through content-addressed keys

evidence.code_observation: Identity arbitration uses Mahalanobis/NLL metrics but lacked adversarial test coverage

audit_findings.reason: Tests verify correct behavior under adversarial conditions that would break scalar/collapsed implementations

audit_findings.claim: Clarify ownership boundaries without changing behavior

evidence.code_observation: IdentityAnisotropicMahalanobisSq was in anonymous namespace, preventing testability
evidence.test_observation: Moved to public API for Phase 12 test coverage

audit_findings.reason: Function moved from anonymous namespace to public bt:: namespace for auditability
